evals.prompt: I need a month-to-date cumulative metric for completed disbursement amounts. The semantic model is sem_disbursements_unified and the measure is called completed_amount. Write the metric YAML.
evals.expected_output: Correct cumulative metric YAML using grain_to_date: month (not window: 1 month)
expectations: References the correct measure name completed_amount
Includes a descriptive name following domain prefix convention (e.g. disbursement_mtd_completed_amount)
Does not use window for a month-to-date metric

evals.prompt: Create a decline_rate ratio metric. I have two measures in my semantic model: decline_cnt (count of declined transactions) and attempt_cnt (count of all attempted transactions). Write the metric YAML for decline_rate as decline_cnt / attempt_cnt.
evals.expected_output: Correct ratio metric that references intermediate simple metrics (not raw measures), since MetricFlow ratio numerator/denominator must be metric names not measure names
expectations: Creates intermediate simple metrics wrapping decline_cnt and attempt_cnt measures
Ratio metric numerator and denominator reference metric names, not measure names
Does not set create_metric: true on the measures AND also define explicit metrics (duplication error)
